title: Critique of current AI safety bug bounty programs
summary: Critique of current AI safety bug bounty programs
whyItMatters: The potential value of AI safety bug bounty programs Generally, AI labs should (and most do) put their models under extensive safety testing before deploying them to prevent misuse, scheming, and other dangerous behaviors.
